channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST][发表] Anime News Network MAO 动画 宣布 More 声优阵容 2nd Part
item.description: Takuya Sato, Rie Kugimiya, Katsuyuki Konishi, Tasuku Kaito, Shino Shimoji join cast ― The official website for Sunrise's television anime based on the MAO manga by Rumiko Takahashi unveiled a new... | 来源: ANN | 原文: MAO Anime Announces More Cast for 2nd Part

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Crunchyroll Stream Kagurabachi 动画
item.description: Katsuyuki Konishi joins cast as Togo Shiba ― Crunchyroll announced on Thursday that it will stream the television anime adaptation of Takeru Hokazono's Kagurabachi manga in April 2027 worldwide... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Crunchyroll to Stream Kagurabachi Anime

item.title: [剧场版][开播][公开] Anime News Network 7th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film 公开 Title, Visual, October 30 开播
item.description: Kia Asamiya shares teaser visual for Nijiiro no Rinne film ― Bandai Namco Filmworks revealed on Friday that the seventh film in Yamato yo Towa ni: Rebel 3199 (Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199), the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 7th Be Forever Yamato: Rebel 3199 Film Reveals Title, Visual, October 30 Premiere

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Kindergarten Wars 动画 Casts Mirei Kumagai

item.title: [剧场版] Anime News Network Studio Khara Produce Segment Baahubali: Eternal War Animated Film
item.description: Film in Indian Telugu-language Baahubali franchise opens in 2027 ― Studio Khara announced on Thursday that it is producing a dedicated sequence as part of the tentatively titled BAAHUBALI: THE... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Studio Khara to Produce Segment in Baahubali: The Eternal War Animated Film

item.title: Anime News Network Naver Webtoon Launches 'Cuts Make' App for Short-Form Animation Creation
